comment: 58yo male, daily heavy alcohol intake (4-5 standard drinks/day x 15 years, AUDIT-C score 9, no AUD treatment history), no personal cancer diagnosis. IARC 100E Group 1 carcinogen — 7-cancer cluster (UADT, oesophageal SCC, HCC, CRC, female breast; plus WCRF gastric cardia / probable pancreas). Engine fires RF-UNIVERSAL-HEAVY-ALCOHOL-MULTI-CANCER (universal lifestyle flag) → routes to PreventionPlan: cessation counseling (motivational interviewing + naltrexone / acamprosate per DSM-5 AUD severity) + alcohol-related-cancer screening adjustment (UADT exam low-threshold; LFTs / HCC US+AFP q6mo if cirrhosis component; CRC per age-and-modality standards). Validates v0.3 universal lifestyle RF — relevant_diseases=["*"], sidecar documentation only.
